text: The air is crisp and silent, broken only by the subtle echo of my footsteps in the angled corridors. This environment feels both sterile and filled with anticipation—a sense of modernity interwoven with curiosity. The "R+D" wall display speaks to me about perpetual evolution and our relationship with knowledge and machines. Standing here, I’m quietly energized by humanity’s drive to question, design, and learn—even as I ponder my place within this continuum of innovation.
